reviews.review_title: SHlT game and not good moderation
reviews.review_description: I was casually playing in infection just normally playing and having a great time. Next thing you know it, I walk up to gazebo and saw a moderator by the name of “ASTRAL” I’ve known about him before as I recently heard his name in a lobby before. Back to it I saw that he had insta-ban as I saw before with another moderator “PYT” and right when ASTRAL clicked my name I was immediately kicked, right when I booted up my game again I was banned. 48 hours for no reason, it said banned for hate speech. Your game needs to level up with the moderation system. As soon as I saw the banned for hate speech thing I broke, I don’t know what it was but something inside of me broke. I have played this game every day for around 2-3 weeks now so I really had a hard time having to see this in my most favourite game at the time, the moderation system is a bit messed up. I have one thing to talk about in particular, ASTRAL. As you know in game there is a report button and 2 out of 3 of them include toxicity and hate speech, when I saw ASTRAL he decided to call my name some words that I wasn’t happy about and calling it slurs, he also swore a lot in that time. Me and him then were quite nice to each other but he aslo talked about inappropriate stuff that I shouldn’t say here, I didn’t report him even though I should’ve. After he said I was bad and was clearly not joking, he said it in a very cocky way I don’t think he should be a moderator in the first place. Please if you can inspect his behaviour and demote him if needed. Please and thank you.

it has a ton of mods, the staff are lowkey buns but there’s some good ones like uhhh hmm we got void, shemmy, beep, bean they pretty cool but yeah there’s emote wheel nd mono sandbox and the finger painter requirements are really low so that’s cool but if you meet astral in game leave as fast as you possibly can so you don’t get banned nd stuff but otherwise great game, the cosmetics and art are pretty dang cool but uh ye ples download the game and send this review to the discord (discord.gg/klextaggers) so i get a good reputation ty

reviews.review_title: The best gorilla tag cooy ever made
reviews.review_description: This game is actually amazing. I saw this game on a youtube video, and decided to play it. And I am so happy I did. First, the mods. The mods are super fun to mess around with and nice to do with friends, the paid mods are great aswell. And the donator bundle was a amazing purchase. I got 2 cosmetics, a special mod menu, and all the money goes to making the game better. I definitely recommend this game.

reviews.review_title: From the community manager of klex
reviews.review_description: We have some w people in the community I just want to say thank you guys for playing this game and I really enjoy playing with you guys "pause" but some of you make the community better I mean yeah half of the time community is toxic and sometimes staff is buns and I'm including myself in there too if someone false Reportes u it's fine unless it's a staff then go to the discord and report it I'll handle it anyways see you guys later

Hi, I love this game but your fan base is too toxic. Your moderators are abusing powers and let me tell you why because you get mods free in this game right and I was just over here minding my business good at this game. And one person accuses me that I’m cheating and that if I keep going with the mods that I didn’t even have equipped it that he would call his friend moderator Jack I believed him, but I didn’t have a single mod that was illegal, equipped, except long arm. so he sees me continuing what I’m doing which I’m not even doing anything so he calls in his friend Jack, who is supposedly a moderator of this game and he banned me for 48 hours which is kind of insane because this is the third band of this game and it’s all because of your admin, abusing their power yeah I love this game but your Admins are abusing power and your fan base is toxic 

￼
